tagline.en: A premium native macOS client for YouTube Music — fast, elegant, and native.
tagline.zh: macOS 原生 YouTube Music 客户端。极速、优雅、原生。

description.en: A lightweight, high-performance native macOS client for YouTube Music built with Swift and SwiftUI. It features a complete native player control bar, system media center integration, and scrollable synchronized lyrics.
description.zh: 基于 Swift and SwiftUI 原生打造的轻量、极速 macOS YouTube Music 客户端。具备独立的原生底部控制条、系统控制中心与媒体键同步，以及侧边栏歌词和透明悬浮的桌面歌词秀。

en: Pure Native Player Bar: Fully hides the default web player and replaces it with a premium macOS control bar interface.
Lock Screen & Media Sync: Full support for physical play/pause, next, and previous media keys and Control Center media cards.
Double-Panel Synced Lyrics: Real-time scrolling lyrics in an Apple Music-style sidebar and a transparent floating desktop capsule.
zh: 原生底部控制条：完全隐藏网页默认播放栏，替换为符合 macOS 设计规范的原生控制界面。
系统锁屏与媒体同步：完美支持物理媒体键（播放/暂停、上一首、下一首）与控制中心媒体卡片同步。
双面板同步歌词：具备 Apple Music 风格的侧边栏滚动歌词以及透明悬浮的桌面歌词秀。
